# extracted/

Stage 2 writes parseable text here after downloading the raw sources.

**Generated by:** Stage 2 acquisition/extraction
**Modified by:** Stage 2 extraction reruns only

## What lives here

- `greek.txt`
- `english.txt`
- other parseable text recovered from source files

## How to read it

- These files are the first machine-readable versions of the source text.
- The next stop is `../clean/`.
